g.text: FIGURE 08 · DOES RECONFIGURATION ADD BEYOND 0-BACK FC?
Same estimator and repeated participant folds

g.text: The 2-SD decision rule is a split-sensitivity heuristic, not a formal superiority or equivalence test.
